name: sljs
description: 矢历健身 uni-app 移动端(微信小程序为主)

scripts.dev:mp-weixin: PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v16.20.2/bin:$PATH cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=./ UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=./dist/build/mp-weixin NODE_ENV=development UNI_PLATFORM=mp-weixin vue-cli-service uni-build --watch
scripts.build:mp-weixin: PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v16.20.2/bin:$PATH cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=./ UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=./dist/build/mp-weixin NODE_ENV=production UNI_PLATFORM=mp-weixin vue-cli-service uni-build
scripts.dev:h5: PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v16.20.2/bin:$PATH cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=./ NODE_ENV=development UNI_PLATFORM=h5 vue-cli-service uni-serve
scripts.build:h5: PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v16.20.2/bin:$PATH cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=./ NODE_ENV=production UNI_PLATFORM=h5 vue-cli-service uni-build
